#  Edit a Commitment 
###### Which type of commitment contract do you want to edit?
[Purchase Order: I want to edit a purchase order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-a-purchase-order)
[Subcontract: I want to edit a subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-a-subcontract)
## See Also
  * [Edit Subcontracts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-subcontracts)
  * [Add a Line Item to a Commitment's Schedule of Values](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/add-a-line-item-to-a-schedule-of-values)
  * [Create Purchase Orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-purchase-orders)
title: Edit a Commitment
description: How to edit an existing subcontract or purchase order in the project's Commitments tool.
